attributes.action: The implementation of Security and Immigration Services (Stop the Boats)
attributes.additional_details: I would like the Government or Parliament to read the Concept of Operations (plan of action) document for Security and Immigration Services, and to implement these services in order to prevent the continued wave of illegal migrants entering the UK.
attributes.background: I would like the Government or Parliament to consider implementing our Security and Immigration Services, which will deter, minimise, and (ultimately) prevent migrants from entering the United Kingdom, illegally and emphasise on strengthening national security and securing British borders.

rejection.details:
We understand that you're concerned about people entering the UK illegally, but we're not exactly sure what action you'd like to see. 

We currently have these petitions open which you may wish to sign: 

Detain, detect and deport all illegal immigrants: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761984

Invoke Article 15 of the ECHR- to help tackle illegal migration: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/748972
